title: Author SessionStaminaCeiling typed shape — composite (harness × model × operator-policy) ceiling
description:
Per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5. Typed shape declaring the session's stamina ceiling, COMPUTED at session-start from three inputs: (1) `HarnessStaminaProfile` (per-harness rate-limits + wall-clock conventions); (2) `AIModelFamilyOrdinalityTable` DNA traits — inferenceCostShape (electricity-only effectively unlimited financial; mid-per-token consumes fastest), contextWindowSizeClass (small/medium/large/xlarge — pending bead `ai-model-family-context-window-size-class-field`); (3) `OperatorPolicy` (substrate-side caps, daily budgets, override rules). Proposed shape: `SessionStaminaCeiling { sessionId, harnessRef: LinkRefModel, modelFamilyOrdinal: Int, computedAt: ISO-8601, contextTokenCeiling: Int, wallClockSeconds: Int, financialUSDCeiling: Double, rateLimitTokensPerMinute: Int, harnessProfileRef + modelDNARef + operatorPolicyRef (provenance LinkRefs) }`. BLOCKS on harness-stamina-profile + ai-model-family-context-window-size-class beads.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- InferenceQuota (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — token-budget ceiling
- InferenceRateLimit (same) — throughput ceiling (rpm/tpm)
- InferenceCircuitBreaker (same) — over-limit policy
- InferenceContextClass (inside InferenceModelEconomics) — context-window class
- AIModelFamilyContextWindowSizeClass (pending bead ai-model-family-context-window-size-class-field) — composite ceiling input
